ns0:entry.ns0:title: MHSanaei/3x-ui
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/MHSanaei/3x-ui
Language: html
Xray panel supporting multi-protocol multi-user expire day & traffic & IP limit (Vmess, Vless, Trojan, ShadowSocks, Wireguard, Tunnel, Mixed, HTTP, Tun)

ns0:entry.ns0:title: Unstructured-IO/unstructured
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/Unstructured-IO/unstructured
Language: html
Convert documents to structured data effortlessly. Unstructured is open-source ETL solution for transforming complex documents into clean, structured formats for language models. Visit our website to learn more about our enterprise grade Platform product for production grade workflows, partitioning, enrichments, chunking and embedding.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: adongwanai/AgentGuide
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/adongwanai/AgentGuide
Language: html
https://adongwanai.github.io/AgentGuide | AI Agent开发指南 | LangGraph实战 | 高级RAG | 转行大模型 | 大模型面试 | 算法工程师 | 面试题库 | 强化学习｜数据合成

ns0:entry.ns0:title: github/opensource.guide
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/github/opensource.guide
Language: html
📚 Community guides for open source creators

ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/kananinirav/AWS-Certified-Cloud-Practitioner-Notes

ns0:entry.ns0:title: lipis/flag-icons
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/lipis/flag-icons
Language: html
🎏 A curated collection of all country flags in SVG — plus the CSS for easier integration

ns0:entry.ns0:title: microsoft/language-server-protocol
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/microsoft/language-server-protocol
Language: html
Defines a common protocol for language servers.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: microsoft/zerotrustassessment
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/microsoft/zerotrustassessment
Language: html
Repository for the Zero Trust Assessment project

ns0:entry.ns0:title: rekryt/iplist
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/rekryt/iplist
Language: html
IP Address Collection and Management Service with multiple output formats: mikrotik, json, text, ipset, nfset, clashx, keenetic, switchy, amnezia

ns0:entry.ns0:title: trycua/cua
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/trycua/cua
Language: html
Open-source infrastructure for Computer-Use Agents. Sandboxes, SDKs, and benchmarks to train and evaluate AI agents that can control full desktops (macOS, Linux, Windows).

ns0:entry.ns0:title: wilsonfreitas/awesome-quant
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/wilsonfreitas/awesome-quant
Language: html
A curated list of insanely awesome libraries, packages and resources for Quants (Quantitative Finance)
